The '''Otta''' was a small, [[Mammal/Legends|mammalian]] predator native to the [[Gungan/Legends|Gungan]] [[Gungan Swamp|swamps]] of [[Naboo/Legends|Naboo]].

==Characteristics==
Ottas were curious, intelligent, and playful. They had a flexible spine for limber movement in and out of water and always being in motion, these swift water [[Species/Legends|creatures]] outswam their predators and nearly always caught their prey, which included [[Mee/Legends|mee]] and [[Mee/Legends|daggerts]]. A single pup often clung to the belly of its mother,<ref name="WSEFG">''[[The Wildlife of Star Wars: A Field Guide]]''</ref> until old enough to defend itself. The Ottas' typical prey were [[Ollopom/Legends|Ollopoms]]. They were also known to prey on [[Tooke/Legends|Tookes]], and [[Pom-hopper]]s. Ottas also crack open [[Nyork]]s with rocks on their chests.<ref name="WSEFG" />

==Appearances==
